name: Cod with Peas and Mushroom Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 can cream of mushroom soup, (10 3/4 oz.), undiluted
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, sauté onion, garlic, and red pepper in butter until fragrant.
2. Stir in the soup, milk, pepper, and lemon juice. Bring to a simmer.
3. Place the cod fillet in a lightly greased baking dish. Stir peas into the sauce; pour over the fish.
4. Cover and bake in a preheated 400 degrees Fahrenheit oven for 25 minutes.
5. Remove cover and bake an additional 10 minutes, or until the fish flakes easily. Makes 4 servings.
